shadow.field: Matches Encroachment Bot started. Waiting for tick sample.

block.field: Matches Encroachment Bot started. Waiting for tick sample.

shadow.field: WIN. Cycle closed and stake reset.

block.field: WIN. Cycle closed and stake reset.

shadow.field: LOSS. Recovery cap reached or martingale disabled; cycle reset.

block.field: LOSS. Recovery cap reached or martingale disabled; cycle reset.

shadow.field: Max daily loss reached. Bot stopped.

block.field: Max daily loss reached. Bot stopped.
